title: Can I sit here?
description: You can sit everywhere now! Just look down and shift for sit!
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) **Lemme sit** is a Data Pack / Mod thats allows you to **sit** everywhere do you want! Just *look down* and *shift* !

![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/060f207a1fc91bffa4abc516f4f0a720f140bff4.png) ## Other links [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1939f49bcb6e53e1f7c526c007eeb1be4a69aeb2.png)‎](https://it.fiverr.com/diesse2007) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/169f5456fb11650701a2af7890b911e62386388e_0.webp)‎](https://x.com/dskianto) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c38479243db42f491e3674a0ccda6de2c934b7f.png)‎](https://wanmine.net/)
